new_content.name: Eureka Orthos
new_content.description: A new deep dungeon with ever-changing architecture where players start at level 81 and progress to 90.

new_content.name: Delve into Myth
new_content.description: Side quest to unlock Eureka Orthos.

new_content.name: Rage Extinguished
new_content.description: Side quest related to Eureka Orthos progression.

new_content.name: Orthos Unveiled
new_content.description: Side quest related to Eureka Orthos progression.

new_content.name: The Spectacle of Inspection
new_content.description: Continuation of the Somehow Further Hildibrand Adventures.

new_content.name: Generational Bonding
new_content.description: Continuation of the Somehow Further Hildibrand Adventures.

new_content.name: Well-oiled
new_content.description: Continuation of the Manderville weapon quest series.

new_content.name: An Original Improvement
new_content.description: Quest to unlock the Splendorous tools enhancement series.

new_content.name: Must Be Dreaming(way)
new_content.description: Tribal main quest to unlock the Loporrit tribal quests.

new_content.name: Quest Sync
new_content.description: Automatic level adjustment system for Loporrit tribal quests.

new_content.name: Tribal Daily Quests (Loporrits)
new_content.description: Daily quests for the Loporrit tribe that utilize the quest sync system.

new_content.name: Splendorous Tools
new_content.description: Feature for Disciples of the Hand and Land to craft or gather items to enhance class-specific tools.

housing.name: Orthos Display Stand
housing.description: An Allagan hologram which depicts a legendary weapon.

housing.name: Dorpokkur Kiln
housing.description: A charming woodstove topped with a decorative dorpokkur, incidentally colored a striking shade of "burnt."

housing.name: Lalafell Lifter
housing.description: Tired of being forgotten in conversation and hitting the edge of the table with your nose? No longer with the Lalafell Lifter, the chair specifically designed to uplift even the smallest of heroes.

housing.name: Simple Low Table
housing.description: A quaint and practical addition to any room.

housing.name: Allagan Terminal Alpha
housing.description: An N-shaped device created to access ancient Allagan systems. Though no longer functional, the light-up display is still hauntingly beautiful.

housing.name: Allagan Terminal Beta
housing.description: An L-shaped device created to access ancient Allagan systems. Though no longer functional, the light-up display is still hauntingly beautiful.

housing.name: Rainbow Hopping Rug
housing.description: A multicolored mat perfect for vigorous and rhythmic bouncing.

glamour.name: Manderville Zweihander Replica
glamour.description: Replica Manderville weapon for Dark Knight.

glamour.name: Manderville Rod Replica
glamour.description: Replica Manderville weapon for Two-handed Thaumaturge.

glamour.name: Manderville Rapier Replica
glamour.description: Replica Manderville weapon for Red Mage.

glamour.name: Manderville Cane Replica
glamour.description: Replica Manderville weapon for Two-handed Conjurer.
